title: machaerium orthocarpum
intro: Machaerium orthocarpum, also known as the "Guácimo" or "Guácimo Blanco", is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Machaerium orthocarpum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and asthma. Machaerium orthocarpum is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots and leaves are used in herbal medicine, often combined with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
